institution.name: Big Sandy Community and Technical College

flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Big Sandy Community and Technical College are 8% below the public certificate-predominant peer median ($33.0k vs $35.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 20% at Big Sandy Community and Technical College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.6k vs 2.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Big Sandy Community and Technical College fell 20% between 2006 and 2009 (16.3% → 13.1%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Big Sandy Community and Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.3% → 0.0%).
